name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

Feature Summary

Provide a clear and concise summary of the feature.

Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.

Proposed Solution

Explain your proposed solution or implementation.

Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or references here.
